findings.description: day_range materializes a full list[date] sized by the span between two caller-supplied dates; if start/end reach this from an unvalidated web entry point (e.g. business_days_between(date.min,date.max)), it enables a memory/CPU amplification DoS (CWE-770/CWE-400, OWASP A06) absent upstream bounds — reachability and existing validation unverifiable from this file alone.
